revision.text: {{#invoke:navbox|navbox | name = Wikipedia policies and guidelines | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}} | title = Wikipedia key [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|policies and guidelines]] {{Tooltip|(?)| Wikipedia's policies and guidelines are developed by the community to describe best practices, clarify principles, resolve conflicts, and otherwise further our goal.}} | basestyle = text-align: center; | groupstyle = text-align:left; | groupwidth = 6.9em | above = * '''[[Wikipedia:Five pillars|Five pillars]]''' ** '''[[Wikipedia:Ignore all rules|Ignore all rules]]''' | group1 = Content {{Tooltip|(?)|defines the scope of the encyclopedia and the material that is suitable for it}} | list1 = child |1_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |1_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 1_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|What Wikipedia is not]] * [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|Biographies of living persons]] * [[Wikipedia:Copyrights|Copyright]] ([[Wikipedia:Copyright violations|Copyright violations]]) * [[Wikipedia:Image use policy|Image use]] * [[Wikipedia:Article titles|Article titles]] |1_group2 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|G}}|2=Guidelines}}''' | 1_list2 = * [[Wikipedia:Notability|Notability]] * [[Wikipedia:Autobiography|Autobiography]] * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|Reliable sources]] ** [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources (medicine)|Medicine]] * [[Wikipedia:Do not include the full text of lengthy primary sources|Do not include copies of lengthy primary sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism|Plagiarism]] * [[Wikipedia:Do not create hoaxes|Don't create hoaxes]] * [[Wikipedia:Fringe theories|Fringe theories]] * [[Wikipedia:Patent nonsense|Patent nonsense]] * [[Wikipedia:External links|External links]] | group2 = Conduct {{Tooltip|(?)|describes how editors can successfully collaborate and what behavior is acceptable}} | list2 = child |2_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |2_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 2_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Civility|Civility]] * [[Wikipedia:Consensus|Consensus]] * [[Wikipedia:Harassment|Harassment]] * [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|Vandalism]] * [[Wikipedia:Ignore all rules|Ignore all rules]] * [[Wikipedia:No personal attacks|No personal attacks]] * [[Wikipedia:Ownership of content|Ownership of content]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit warring|Edit warring]] * [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution|Dispute resolution]] * [[Wikipedia:Sockpuppetry|Sockpuppetry]] * [[Wikipedia:No legal threats|No legal threats]] * [[Wikipedia:Child protection|Child protection]] * [[Wikipedia:Paid-contribution disclosure|Paid-contribution disclosure]] |2_group2 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|G}}|2=Guidelines}}''' | 2_list2 = * [[Wikipedia:Assume good faith|Assume good faith]] * [[Wikipedia:Conflict of interest|Conflict of interest]] * [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|Disruptive editing]] * [[Wikipedia:Do not disrupt Wikipedia to illustrate a point|Do not disrupt Wikipedia to illustrate a point]] * [[Wikipedia:Etiquette|Etiquette]] * [[Wikipedia:Gaming the system|Gaming the system]] * [[Wikipedia:Please do not bite the newcomers|Please do not bite the newcomers]] * [[Wikipedia:Courtesy vanishing|Courtesy vanishing]] * [[Wikipedia:Responding to threats of harm|Responding to threats of harm]] * [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|Talk page guidelines]] ** [[Wikipedia:Signatures|Signatures]] | group3 = Deletion {{Tooltip|(?)|explains the processes by which pages, revisions, and logs may be deleted}} | list3 = child |3_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |3_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 3_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Deletion policy|Deletion policy]] * [[Wikipedia:Proposed deletion|Proposed deletion]] ** [[Wikipedia:Proposed deletion of biographies of living people|Biographies]] * [[Wikipedia:Criteria for speedy deletion|Criteria for speedy deletion]] * [[Wikipedia:Attack page|Attack page]] * [[Wikipedia:Oversight|Oversight]] * [[Wikipedia:Revision deletion|Revision deletion]] | group4 = Enforcement {{Tooltip|(?)|explains the various means by which standards may be enforced}} | list4 =child |4_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |4_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 4_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Administrators|Administrators]] * [[Wikipedia:Banning policy|Banning]] * [[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|Blocking]] * [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|Page protection]] | group5 = Editing {{Tooltip|(?)| documents the various protocols about style and grouping}} | list5 = child |5_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |5_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 5_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Editing policy|Editing policy]] |5_group2 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|G}}|2=Guidelines}}''' | 5_list2 = child |5_2_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |5_2_group1 = | 5_2_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Article size|Article size]] **[[Wikipedia:Summary style|Summary style]] * [[Wikipedia:Be bold|Be bold]] * [[Wikipedia:Disambiguation|Disambiguation]] * [[Wikipedia:Hatnote|Hatnotes]] * [[Wikipedia:Broad-concept article|Broad-concept article]] * [[Wikipedia:Make technical articles understandable|Understandability]] |5_2_group2 = Style | 5_2_list2 = * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style|Manual of Style]] ** [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Contents|Contents]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|Accessibility]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Dates and numbers|Dates and numbers]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Images|Images]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout|Layout]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lead section|Lead section]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Linking|Linking]] * [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Lists|Lists]] |5_2_group3 =Classification | 5_2_list3 = * [[Wikipedia:Categories, lists, and navigation templates|Categories, lists, and navigation templates]] * [[Wikipedia:Categorization|Categorization]] * [[Wikipedia:Template namespace|Template namespace]] | group6 = Project content {{Tooltip|(?)| protocols related to administration}} | list6 =child |6_group1style = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |6_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|G}}|2=Guidelines}}''' | 6_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|Project namespace]] ** [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Council/Guide|WikiProjects]] * [[Wikipedia:User pages|User pages]] ** [[Wikipedia:Userboxes|User boxes]] * [[Wikipedia:Shortcut|Shortcuts]] * [[Wikipedia:Subpages|Subpages]] | group7 = WMF {{Abbr|(?)| official policies and statements of the Wikimedia Foundation}} | group7style = background: #dddddd;color:inherit; | list7=child |7_group1style = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; background: #e6e6e6;color:inherit; |7_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 7_list1 = * [[:wmf:Policy:Universal Code of Conduct|Universal Code of Conduct]] * [[:wmf:Terms of Use|Terms of Use]] * [[:wmf:Policies|List of policies]] * [[:wmf:Friendly space policy|Friendly space policy]] * [[:wmf:Resolution:Licensing policy|Licensing and copyright]] * [[:wmf:Privacy policy|Privacy policy]] | belowstyle = font-weight: normal; | below = * '''[[Wikipedia:List of policies and guidelines|List of all policies and guidelines]]''' ** '''{{Big|P}}''': '''[[Wikipedia:List of policies|List of policies]]''' ** '''{{Big|G}}''': '''[[Wikipedia:List of guidelines|List of guidelines]]''' * '''[[Wikipedia:Principles|Summaries of values and principles]]''' }} {{Documentation}}

{{#invoke:navbox|navbox | name = Wikipedia policies and guidelines | state = {{{state|{{{1|autocollapse}}}}}} | bodyclass = hlist | titlestyle = {{{titlestyle|}}} | title = Wikipedia key [[Wikipedia:Policies and guidelines|policies and guidelines]] {{Tooltip|(?)| Wikipedia's policies and guidelines are developed by the community to describe best practices, clarify principles, resolve conflicts, and otherwise further our goal.}} | basestyle = text-align: center; | groupstyle = text-align:left; | groupwidth = 6.9em | above = * '''[[Wikipedia:Five pillars|Five pillars]]''' ** '''[[Wikipedia:Ignore all rules|Ignore all rules]]''' | group1 = Content {{Tooltip|(?)|defines the scope of the encyclopedia and the material that is suitable for it}} | list1 = child |1_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |1_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 1_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Verifiability|Verifiability]] * [[Wikipedia:No original research|No original research]] * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:What Wikipedia is not|What Wikipedia is not]] * [[Wikipedia:Biographies of living persons|Biographies of living persons]] * [[Wikipedia:Copyrights|Copyright]] ([[Wikipedia:Copyright violations|Copyright violations]]) * [[Wikipedia:Image use policy|Image use]] * [[Wikipedia:Article titles|Article titles]] |1_group2 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|G}}|2=Guidelines}}''' | 1_list2 = * [[Wikipedia:Notability|Notability]] * [[Wikipedia:Autobiography|Autobiography]] * [[Wikipedia:Citing sources|Citing sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|Reliable sources]] ** [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources (medicine)|Medicine]] * [[Wikipedia:Do not include the full text of lengthy primary sources|Do not include copies of lengthy primary sources]] * [[Wikipedia:Plagiarism|Plagiarism]] * [[Wikipedia:Do not create hoaxes|Don't create hoaxes]] * [[Wikipedia:Fringe theories|Fringe theories]] * [[Wikipedia:Patent nonsense|Patent nonsense]] * [[Wikipedia:External links|External links]] | group2 = Conduct {{Tooltip|(?)|describes how editors can successfully collaborate and what behavior is acceptable}} | list2 = child |2_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |2_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 2_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Civility|Civility]] * [[Wikipedia:Consensus|Consensus]] * [[Wikipedia:Harassment|Harassment]] * [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|Vandalism]] * [[Wikipedia:Ignore all rules|Ignore all rules]] * [[Wikipedia:No personal attacks|No personal attacks]] * [[Wikipedia:Ownership of content|Ownership of content]] * [[Wikipedia:Edit warring|Edit warring]] * [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution|Dispute resolution]] * [[Wikipedia:Sockpuppetry|Sockpuppetry]] * [[Wikipedia:No legal threats|No legal threats]] * [[Wikipedia:Child protection|Child protection]] * [[Wikipedia:Paid-contribution disclosure|Paid-contribution disclosure]] |2_group2 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|G}}|2=Guidelines}}''' | 2_list2 = * [[Wikipedia:Assume good faith|Assume good faith]] * [[Wikipedia:Conflict of interest|Conflict of interest]] * [[Wikipedia:Disruptive editing|Disruptive editing]] * [[Wikipedia:Do not disrupt Wikipedia to illustrate a point|Do not disrupt Wikipedia to illustrate a point]] * [[Wikipedia:Etiquette|Etiquette]] * [[Wikipedia:Gaming the system|Gaming the system]] * [[Wikipedia:Please do not bite the newcomers|Please do not bite the newcomers]] * [[Wikipedia:Courtesy vanishing|Courtesy vanishing]] * [[Wikipedia:Responding to threats of harm|Responding to threats of harm]] * [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines|Talk page guidelines]] ** [[Wikipedia:Signatures|Signatures]] | group3 = Deletion {{Tooltip|(?)|explains the processes by which pages, revisions, and logs may be deleted}} | list3 = child |3_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |3_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 3_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Deletion policy|Deletion policy]] * [[Wikipedia:Proposed deletion|Proposed deletion]] ** [[Wikipedia:Proposed deletion of biographies of living people|Biographies]] * [[Wikipedia:Criteria for speedy deletion|Criteria for speedy deletion]] * [[Wikipedia:Attack page|Attack page]] * [[Wikipedia:Oversight|Oversight]] * [[Wikipedia:Revision deletion|Revision deletion]] | group4 = Enforcement {{Tooltip|(?)|explains the various means by which standards may be enforced}} | list4 =child |4_groupstyle = text-align:left; font-weight: normal; |4_group1 = '''{{abbr|1={{Large|P}}|2=Policies}}''' | 4_list1 = * [[Wikipedia:Administrators|Administrators]] * [[Wikipedia:Banning policy|Banning]] * [[Wikipedia:Blocking policy|Blocking]] * [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|Page protection]] | group5 = Editing {{Tooltip|(?)| documents the various protocols about style and grouping}} | list5 = child |5_groupstyle = text-align:left;
